app.title: A Git helper tool that breaks large merges into parallelizable tasks
app.author: schusterfredl
app.description: A Git helper tool that breaks large merges into parallelizable tasks
proposed_tests: Clone the repo, prepare a large merge with several conflicts
Run mergetopus to break the merge into parallel tasks, measure execution time
Compare the result against a manual merge
Benchmark against Git's internal merge algorithm
